channel.title: it's giving news
channel.description: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. like a disheveled little wobbly hog sprinting to the trough, come on down, lil piggie. your daily hot and messy ai slop is served... enjoy ✨
channel.itunes:author: Reid McGill
channel.itunes:summary: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. your daily hot and messy ai slop, served. ✨
channel.itunes:subtitle: A sharp morning briefing with James and Anne.

item.title: Government Outsourcing the Brain to Anthropic
item.description: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.content:encoded: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: China Resets the AI Race Clock
item.description: Topics: FAA, NASA, Nvidia, Anthropic, Bombardier. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: Topics: FAA, NASA, Nvidia, Anthropic, Bombardier. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.content:encoded: Topics: FAA, NASA, Nvidia, Anthropic, Bombardier. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill
